---
title: "Página 1 — Acceso e Indicadores Laborales"
subtitle: "EQUILAB · DAT4CCIÓN 2026"
date: today
lang: es
format:
  dashboard:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    theme: cosmo
    self-contained: true
    code-fold: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

## 
```{r}
library(arrow)     
library(dplyr)      
library(ggplot2)    
library(plotly)    
library(Hmisc)      
```

```{r}
df_pet <- read_parquet("../datos/geih_pet_2019_2025.parquet")

glimpse(df_pet)

```

```{r}
df_base <- df_pet |>
  filter(
    sexo %in% c(1, 2),    
    edad >= 15,            
    edad <= 99             
  )
```


```{r}

# Calcular tasas
tasas_anuales <- df_base |>
  group_by(anio, sexo) |>
  summarise(
    PET         = sum(fex, na.rm = TRUE),
    PEA         = sum(fex[condicion_activ %in% c(1, 2, 3)], na.rm = TRUE),
    Ocupados    = sum(fex[condicion_activ %in% c(1, 2)], na.rm = TRUE),
    Desocupados = sum(fex[condicion_activ == 3], na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(
    TGP        = round(PEA / PET * 100, 2),
    TO         = round(Ocupados / PET * 100, 2),
    TD         = round(Desocupados / PEA * 100, 2),
    sexo_label = if_else(sexo == 1, "Hombres", "Mujeres")
  ) |>
  select(Año = anio, Sexo = sexo_label, `TGP (%)` = TGP, `TO (%)` = TO, `TD (%)` = TD)

# Tabla
tasas_anuales |>
  knitr::kable(
    col.names = c("Año", "Sexo", "TGP (%)", "TO (%)", "TD (%)"),
    align = c("c", "l", "c", "c", "c")
  )

```
